blended.narrative: Boyne Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.
Wednesday: 5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: dry, highs of 29°F, winds around 21 mph.
